title: JFlix (In Progress)
description: JFlix is a full-stack Netflix clone with a Node.js (Express) backend and an Angular frontend built in TypeScript. It features Firebase Google authentication, TMDB-powered movie data, MongoDB for user preferences, and sleek horizontal scrolling movie sections styled with Tailwind CSS.

title: AI Video Generator
description: An advanced AI-powered video generation application that creates videos from text prompts or images. This local-deployment project showcases machine learning capabilities for automated video content creation.

title: JChat
description: JChat is an intelligent chatbot website that provides interactive conversational experiences. Built with modern web technologies, it offers real-time messaging capabilities and AI-powered responses for engaging user interactions.

title: MonoPixel
description: MonoPixel is a minimalist pixel drawing web app built with Next.js and TypeScript. It features a dynamic zoomable canvas (8x8 to 128x128), smooth UI controls, and an efficient state system—perfect for prototyping pixel art.
